Business.title: Business
Business.description: Represents a business using the Local Leap platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

googleMapsUrl.description: Google Maps URL of the business.

industryCategory.description: Category of the business's industry (e.g., Restaurant, Retail).

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a customer review of a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

rating.description: Rating given by the customer (1-5 stars).

comment.description: Textual comment provided by the customer.

reviewDate.description: Date and time when the review was submitted.

isFiltered.description: Indicates whether the review was filtered (1-4 stars).

customerName.description: Name of the customer who submitted the review.

customerEmail.description: Email of the customer who submitted the review.

GoogleBusinessProfile.title: GoogleBusinessProfile
GoogleBusinessProfile.description: Represents a Google Business Profile listing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GoogleBusinessProfile entity.

profileName.description: Name of the business as it appears on Google.

categoryIds.description: References to Categories. (Relationship: Category N:N GoogleBusinessProfile)

description.description: Description of the business on Google.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the business location.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the business location.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category for Google Business Profile listings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a post on a Google Business Profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

postDateTime.description: Date and time the post was published.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image associated with the post.

LandingPage.title: LandingPage
LandingPage.description: Represents a landing page created for a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LandingPage entity.

logoUrl.description: URL of the logo displayed on the landing page.

primaryColor.description: Primary color used in the landing page design (e.g., #4285F4).

SubscriptionPlan.title: SubscriptionPlan
SubscriptionPlan.description: Represents a subscription plan for the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SubscriptionPlan entity.

name.description: Name of the subscription plan (e.g., Basic, Premium).

price.description: Price of the subscription plan (monthly or annually).

locationLimit.description: Maximum number of locations allowed for this plan.

featureSet.description: List of features included in this subscription plan.

ContactForm.title: ContactForm
ContactForm.description: Represents a contact form associated with a landing page.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ContactForm entity.

fields.description: Array of fields to be displayed in the Contact Form

definition.description: Stores business entities.  `businessId` is the unique identifier for each business.

params.name: businessId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

definition.description: Stores reviews associated with a business.  Includes denormalized business information as necessary for authorization independence.

params.name: businessId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

definition.description: Stores Google Business Profiles associated with a business.

params.name: businessId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

params.name: googleBusinessProfileId
params.description: Unique identifier for the GoogleBusinessProfile entity.

definition.description: Stores posts associated with a Google Business Profile.

params.name: businessId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

params.name: googleBusinessProfileId
params.description: Unique identifier for the GoogleBusinessProfile entity.

params.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

params.name: businessId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

params.name: landingPageId
params.description: Unique identifier for the LandingPage entity.

definition.description: Stores contact forms associated with a landing page.

params.name: businessId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

params.name: landingPageId
params.description: Unique identifier for the LandingPage entity.

params.name: contactFormId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ContactForm entity.

params.name: subscriptionPlanId
params.description: Unique identifier for the SubscriptionPlan entity.

firestore.reasoning:
This Firestore structure prioritizes authorization independence and QAPs (Rules are not Filters) as mandated. It leverages structural segregation to ensure homogeneous security postures within collections and subcollections.  

*   **Businesses:** The `businesses` collection stores business-related data. Each business document is identified by a unique `businessId`.  
*   **Reviews:** Reviews are stored in a subcollection of the business (`/businesses/{businessId}/reviews/{reviewId}`). This allows efficient querying of reviews associated with a specific business.  
*   **Google Business Profiles:** Google Business Profiles are stored in a subcollection of the business (`/businesses/{businessId}/googleBusinessProfiles/{googleBusinessProfileId}`). This approach allows efficient querying of Google Business Profiles associated with a specific business.
*   **Posts:** Posts are stored in a subcollection of the Google Business Profile (`/businesses/{businessId}/googleBusinessProfiles/{googleBusinessProfileId}/posts/{postId}`).
*   **Landing Pages:** Landing Pages are stored in a subcollection of the business (`/businesses/{businessId}/landingPages/{landingPageId}`). This allows efficient querying of landing pages associated with a specific business. 
*   **Contact Forms:** Contact Forms are stored in a subcollection of the landing page (`/businesses/{businessId}/landingPages/{landingPageId}/contactForms/{contactFormId}`).  This allows efficient querying of contact forms associated with a specific landing page. 
*   **Subscription Plans:** The `subscriptionPlans` collection stores subscription plan details.  

**Authorization Independence:**

*   The structure enables authorization independence by avoiding `get()` calls in the security rules. For example, access to `/businesses/{businessId}/reviews/{reviewId}` will rely on the existence of the business document and potentially on denormalized data within the review document itself (e.g., copying business ownership details into the review). 

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**

*   Structural segregation supports QAPs. For instance, if there were a need to separate public and private reviews, they would be stored in separate collections or subcollections (e.g., `/businesses/{businessId}/public_reviews/{reviewId}` and `/businesses/{businessId}/private_reviews/{reviewId}`), each with its own security rules. This prevents the need to filter based on review content in the rules, which is an anti-pattern.
